scripts.build: node scripts/build-css.mjs && node scripts/build-review-app.mjs && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --minify --tree-shaking=true --drop:debugger --sourcemap=linked --outfile=../../plugin/bin/haiku --banner:js='import{createRequire}from"module";const require=createRequire(import.meta.url);' && chmod +x ../../plugin/bin/haiku
scripts.postbuild: if [ -n "$SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN" ]; then sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org the-bushido-collective --project haiku-mcp --release haiku-mcp@$(node -e "process.stdout.write(require('../../plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json').version)") ../../plugin/bin/haiku.map && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org the-bushido-collective --project haiku-spa --release haiku-spa@$(node -e "process.stdout.write(require('../../plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json').version)") review-app/dist/assets/; fi
